source: URA Data Service · PMI_Resi_Transaction (60-month rolling window)
note: Derived view (computed PSF, medians, trends, distributions, approximate repeat-sale returns) over URA caveat data. Caveat data covers ~80–90% of resale/sub-sale volume on a 60-month rolling window. Repeat-sale matching is approximate: the feed has no unit number, so 'same unit' is proxied by identical floor area + floor band within a project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by URA.
